channel.title: Testing on OpenSwap Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Testing on OpenSwap Guide

item.title: Self-Hosted API Mocking Tools: WireMock vs Mockoon vs MockServer (2026)
item.description: Building and testing applications often requires talking to external APIs — payment gateways, weather services, third-party data providers, or internal microservices that are not yet ready. Waiting for these services to be available slows down development. Relying on production APIs in tests makes your test suite flaky and unpredictable. The solution is API mocking: simulating API responses locally so your development and testing can proceed independently of external dependencies.
